title: austromyrtus inophloia
intro: Austromyrtus inophloia, also known as the Midnight Tea or the Native Lemon Myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to eastern Australia and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Austromyrtus inophloia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
